## [03:03 - 06:05]

This is the important one. And what we're looking for is strong figures. So anything around that sort of 1% click-through rate. And also we want to look at our cost per click. When the audience, we had brides and we were using women that were just recently married. Now, this can be deceiving to look at it like this, right? Because you're going, okay, this is not working. However, what you need to now do is, and you need to do this with every single ad set is you go into the ad level and you repeat the process in here to see, is it actually just an ad that's dropping the ball or is it across the board?
